title: Ship your first Managed Agent
summary: A YouTube tutorial on Anthropic's Managed Agents platform demonstrates how to build and deploy a working incident-investigator agent using six core functions. The platform supports defining agents, environments, and sessions, with streaming event handling and custom tool integration.
